instagram.header: 🔗 Link in bio → command the beast
instagram.caption: The forest floor trembles beneath the weight of the Mossfang Ravager. 🐾 This high-pressure beast from the Kronos realm wastes no time, hitting the board with ferocious momentum. With Mossfang Rush, your opponent has nowhere to hide. Will you unleash the wild or let your defenses crumble? 🌿🔥
instagram.alt_text: A ferocious Mossfang Ravager beast creature standing in a dark fantasy forest environment, ready to strike.

facebook.body: In the shattered realm of Kronos, nature has been twisted by the creeping corruption of the Void. The Mossfang Ravager is a testament to this savage evolution. As a 4-mana, 4/3 unit, it serves as your primary pressure tool on the battlefield. Its signature ability, Mossfang Rush, grants it both Charge and Overwhelm, allowing it to bypass stall tactics and strike directly at the heart of your opponent's formation. When the battle demands speed and raw power, the Ravager is the only answer. How are you incorporating high-pressure beasts into your current deck strategy? Share your deck-building tips below.
facebook.link_cta: Start your journey and build your deck here:

discord.content:
**Card Spotlight: Mossfang Ravager**

Meet the apex predator of the Kronos realm. The Mossfang Ravager is built for players who refuse to wait. 

- **Role:** Fast Beast / Pressure Unit
- **Stats:** 4 Mana, 4/3
- **Ability:** Mossfang Rush (Charge + Overwhelm)

This unit is a staple for aggressive deck archetypes, punishing opponents who attempt to develop their board slowly. Don't let your enemies breathe—[Play VOIDBORN now](https://voidborn.fun) to add this beast to your collection.
